Name: -1_taste_bad_think_things
Representative_Docs: ["If someone had bad taste they might say things to people that are not appropriate. They may participate in activities that are morally wrong such as drunken or lewd behavior. They might garish things. They might participate in activities that the general public would think were immoral. The one thing that I think this person has is poor taste in the movie genres he watches. He likes to watch Lifetime movies which usually involve men who aren't treating women well and he likes horror movies. He isn't some deviant person and is really nice actually, but I feel he has poor taste in movies. This is really a hard question to answer. The only other thing I can think of is his taste in food. He puts hot sauce on everything he eats and he also like eating moose heart and liver, which is gross.", 'when someone can not judge good fashion trend or great taste then we can say he or she does not have bad taste. My brother has a bad taste, he cannot think which food is good and not good with less taste, also he cannot get the good clothes for him as he has a bad taste of clothes.', 'When I say that someone has bad taste, it means that in my opinion, the things that person likes is very different from the things I like, so, therefore, they have bad taste. I think that people who have gaudy lawn ornaments have bad taste because in my opinion, it makes their lawns look like a disaster.']

Name: 0_bad_taste_movies_shows
Representative_Docs: ["Someone has a bad taste in something when they enjoy something I do not; for example I would say someone might have a 'bad taste' in movies if they watch a lot of rom-coms. Someone else could also say that they have a good taste in movies; it is very subjective. I have met a lot of people traveling through the country that I perceive as having a bad taste in certain aspects (political beliefs, entertainment) due to conversations I've had with them. The conversations are respectful, but we don't get along well.", "Someone with bad taste would suggest or display something that not a lot of people find appealing. With the movie example it could be someone who chooses movies that most people wouldn't enjoy.  I would say my wife again but with her choice of movies. I would say 9/10 movies she picks when we watch are bad and that most people would not enjoy.", 'The person enjoys something that I think is bad. Like they enjoy a certain movies and they recommend those movies to me. The movies are usually horrible. I would say that person has bad taste.  Similar scenario. I know someone that enjoy suggesting shows to me, but half the time the shows are bad. I often say this person has bad taste in shows.']

Name: 1_taste_bad_means_person
Representative_Docs: ["Bad taste is much easier to determine because junk is much easier to identify. Bad taste is something more people would agree on if it fit that category. Usually something vulgar or upsetting can easily be in bad taste. I think someone who want to be out of left field or radical or even fight against norms to make a statement want to have bad taste on purpose. Sometimes a person has bad taste because they don't know any better because no one told them. Or they just can miserable and have poor taste to reflect how they are.", "Bad taste to me usually means someone prefers things that seem ugly or just not good to me.  People with bad taste usually don't like things that are considered to be in good taste by most people. Lisa usually has poor taste.  She seems to limit herself to only a few things that she likes and refuses to even consider something new or different.", "Bad taste would be defined by a lack of manners or behavior not quite up to a certain innate standard that seems to be inborn with me. Being crude, crass or vulgar, for example, would be in low taste to me. I was born and raised in the southern United States , where historically there are behaviors that divide bad and good taste, regardless of any racial group or financial status. Some things just aren't done, or they would be considered tacky. It's weird because I don't remember ever being specifically told what was good and what was not, it was just understood, if that makes any sense.  It's hard to explain this and not feel like a snob. Well, I would have to say yes I know someone who I consider to have bad taste. There is a difference though between someone who doesn't know any better versus someone that knows how to act but ignores that fact. Again, to me taste and style are two different animals. Style can change and evolves, I think but taste is more of a character quality.  And I am a huge snob probably lol, although I would never tell anyone or show in any way that I thought someone acted in bad taste or had bad style either way. That would be in bad taste, in my opinion."]

Name: 2_clothes_like_dress_colors
Representative_Docs: ["They like things that I consider to be tacky or unattractive. As I've grown older I've become less judgemental, so it's difficult for me to think of a specific person, but I would think that they would dress and decorate in a way that emphasizes loud, clashing colors and patterns or in a way that's haphazard and shows no clear plan or vision.", "A person has a bad taste in style.  If the clothes are baggy or not stylish when the person wears it in tacky way. This person dresses in baggy clothes and has a poor taste wear the clothes are not fitted and the fashion is outdated and the clothes don't match well with the shoes and colors.", 'They tend to like cruder things, vulgarity, like unnecessary violence and pornography. The sort of person that thinks of a beer logo as high art. I friend from high school. He decorated his basement with beer signs, neon signs, a bar and large video games. In high school he spent a lot on his car, adding a lot of unnecessary decorations. He likes crude things. He now lives in a trailer.']

Name: 3_sense_person_likes_qualities
Representative_Docs: ["Narrow minded and narrowly focused.  Dismissive of anything outside of their likes and interests and not open to expanding their focus. He's dismissive of of musical genres such as jazz, classical, hip hop - no interest in anything that might require some effort.", 'A person who does not respect others and uses horrible language around others to make their selves look big! Someone who has a bad moral character  I know a person who thinks he is the best HeLies and would cheat anyone out of a nickel He treats women like they were trash and hates animals', 'Someone who may have their own ideas about the aesthetic qualities of objects which generally go against beliefs held by most people in society. Someone who has a sense of humor that is sophomoric and doesn\'t realize that others may take offense. A person who can\'t distinguish the qualities that make items desirable to the majority. I had an employee several years ago that considered herself an artist, she was always whining about how difficult it was to create something that others didn\'t seem to appreciate - she was always looking for her "audience". The problem was that her esoteric leanings may have made a great deal of sense to her but the rest of the world saw them as poorly envisioned crap.']

Name: 5_bad_taste_ugly_looks
Representative_Docs: ['I think someone with bad taste is a person who might be superficial, or like something for superficial reasons. It’s hard to describe, but I feel like you would know bad taste when you see it. A person I knew with poor taste was pretty wealthy, but dressed badly. Although the clothing he wore was very fine and expensive, I found that he had very poor personal style because his attitude towards fashion was very much that if something was pricey, it was automatically “more stylish” than something cheap or affordable. I think what made his aesthetic bad was that he put very little thought into what he wore, other than it being luxury.', 'A person who has a bad taste is a person who likes ugly and cheap stuff. He/she likes to collect junk or dress ugly. For example, he wears jean and t-shirt to a wedding. Another example, she collects junk jewelry like fake ugly bracelet. I think Lady Gaga has a bad taste in how she dress up in front of public. Even though she is a good singer and very famous but the way she dress looks weird.', 'When I say bad taste, it means that the person does not pay attention to the finer details of things and just decide to follow everyone without knowing why they picked it. For example, in fashion, people would pick the worst outfits that despite having unique patterns, they did it in a way that it looks cheap and does not elevate their look. I think in a lot of ways, Lil Wayne is a person with bad taste. His fashion choice is a disaster, as he tries to show off his jewelry full of diamonds without having any meaning besides trying to show off. The outfits he wore always scream cheap and bad fit. I think due to his personality, most of the things he did are in bad taste.']
